name: Crispy Chicken Chop
description: Juicy chicken thigh coated in crispy breadcrumbs, served with mashed potatoes and coleslaw

reviews.comment: Good portion size, crispy coating but sauce could be better
Tasty but portion felt smaller than expected for the price

name: Original Chicken Chop
description: Signature fried chicken chop with secret recipe herbs and spices, served with whipped potatoes and coleslaw

reviews.comment: Best chicken chop in town! Generous portion and amazing flavor
Great value for money. Crispy and well-seasoned
Good but sometimes inconsistent quality

offers.title: Lunch Combo Deal
offers.description: Add a drink and dessert for only RM5 more

name: Chicken Maryland
description: Classic fried chicken chop with mushroom sauce, served with fries and coleslaw

reviews.comment: Overpriced for the portion size. Taste is average
Not worth the price. Small portion and dry chicken

name: Big Mac
description: Two all-beef patties, special sauce, lettuce, cheese, pickles, onions on a sesame seed bun

reviews.comment: Classic taste, consistent quality
Good but getting smaller over the years

offers.title: Meal Upgrade
offers.description: Upgrade to meal with fries and drink for RM5

name: Whopper
description: Flame-grilled beef patty with fresh tomatoes, lettuce, pickles, onions, mayo, and ketchup

reviews.comment: Huge portion! Best value burger around
Great flame-grilled taste, satisfying size

offers.title: Burger King App Deal
offers.description: 20% off when ordering through BK app

name: 2pc Original Recipe Chicken
description: 2 pieces of our signature Original Recipe fried chicken with secret blend of 11 herbs and spices

reviews.comment: Perfectly crispy and juicy. Best fried chicken ever!
Classic KFC taste, never disappoints

name: 6pcs Crispy Chicken Combo
description: 6 pieces of crispy fried chicken with soy garlic or hot sauce, served with fries and drink

reviews.comment: Amazing soy garlic flavor! Great for sharing
Delicious but expensive. Good for special occasions

name: 6pc Chicken McNuggets
description: Tender chicken nuggets made with white meat, served with your choice of sauce

reviews.comment: Classic nuggets, good snack but not filling

name: French Fries Large
description: Golden crispy fries, world-famous

reviews.comment: Best fast food fries, always crispy

name: Onion Rings Large
description: Crispy battered onion rings

reviews.comment: Good alternative to fries, crispy

name: 2pc Chicken Combo
description: 2 pieces fried chicken with fries and drink

reviews.comment: Decent combo but chicken is oily

name: Signature Chicken Chop
description: Juicy grilled chicken with homemade mushroom sauce, served with fresh salad and mashed potatoes. Family recipe passed down for generations.

reviews.comment: Amazing value! Better than chains at half the price. Owner is so friendly too.
Hidden gem! Crispy outside, juicy inside. RM12.90 is a steal.

offers.title: Student Deal
offers.description: 10% off with student ID, includes free drink

name: Special Nasi Lemak Ayam Goreng
description: Fragrant coconut rice with crispy fried chicken, sambal, peanuts, ikan bilis, egg, and cucumber. Authentic Malaysian breakfast favorite.

reviews.comment: Best nasi lemak in Sunway! Uncle Lim uses fresh ingredients daily. RM8.50 for this quality is unbeatable.

name: Traditional Kopi Latte
description: Rich and aromatic Malaysian-style coffee with condensed milk. Brewed using traditional sock filter method for authentic flavor.

reviews.comment: Better than Starbucks at 1/3 the price! Authentic kopitiam taste.
Strong coffee, great value. Aunty remembers my order every time!

offers.title: Morning Special
offers.description: Kopi + Kaya Toast for RM7 (save RM2)

name: Ayam Goreng Berempah
description: Crispy fried chicken with aromatic Malaysian spices. Marinated overnight for maximum flavor. Served with sambal belacan.

reviews.comment: Spicy, crispy, delicious! Way better than fast food chains. The rempah is authentic.

name: Classic Beef Burger
description: Juicy beef patty with fresh lettuce, tomato, cheese, and special sauce. Grilled to order. Popular with students for 10 years.

reviews.comment: RM7.90 for a proper beef burger? Amazing! Tastes homemade, not factory-made like fast food.
Go-to lunch spot. Abang always remembers 'extra sauce' request. Great value!

offers.title: Student Combo
offers.description: Burger + Fries + Drink for RM10 (save RM3)

name: CEO Latte
description: Signature creamy latte with smooth espresso and fresh milk. ZUS's bestseller.

reviews.comment: Great value at RM8.90! Smooth and creamy, better than Starbucks at half the price.

offers.title: Buy 2 Free 1
offers.description: Buy 2 drinks, get 1 free on Wednesdays

name: Caffè Latte
description: Rich espresso balanced with steamed milk and a light layer of foam.

reviews.comment: Good coffee but pricey at RM14.50. Quality is consistent though.

name: Bang Bang Fresh Milk Tea
description: Signature black tea with fresh milk and chewy pearls.

reviews.comment: RM8.50 for large size with pearls is great value! Tastes fresh, not too sweet.

name: Salmon Onigiri Set
description: Fresh salmon onigiri with miso soup. Perfect quick meal.

reviews.comment: RM9.90 for salmon onigiri + soup is decent. Good for a quick lunch.

name: Tuna Sub 6-inch
description: Flaked tuna mixed with creamy mayo, topped with fresh vegetables on freshly baked bread.

reviews.comment: Fresh ingredients but RM13.90 is quite expensive for a 6-inch sub.

name: Pepperoni Lover's Pizza Regular
description: Classic pizza loaded with pepperoni and mozzarella cheese.

reviews.comment: Good pizza but RM32.90 is pricey. Better value with their lunch deals.

name: 2pc Fried Chicken Combo
description: Crispy golden fried chicken with honey butter biscuit, fries and drink.

reviews.comment: Juicy chicken and great honey biscuit! RM19.90 is fair for the portion.

name: Nasi Campur Ayam Goreng
description: Fragrant rice with 2 side dishes and fried chicken. Authentic Malay home cooking.

reviews.comment: RM9.50 for nasi campur with 2 lauk is amazing! Tastes like home cooking.

name: Nasi Lemak Special Rendang
description: Coconut rice with beef rendang, sambal, egg, peanuts and ikan bilis. Family recipe.

reviews.comment: The rendang is amazing! RM12.50 for this quality is worth every sen.

name: Roti Canai Telur + Dal
description: Fluffy crispy roti with egg served with dhal curry and sambal. Mamak classic.

reviews.comment: RM3.50 for roti telur with dal? Best value breakfast in town! Crispy and delicious.

name: Char Kuey Teow Special
description: Wok-fried flat noodles with prawns, cockles, egg and Chinese sausage. Penang style.

reviews.comment: Authentic Penang taste! Wok hei is perfect. RM11.90 for special with prawns is fair.

name: Teh Tarik Kurang Manis
description: Traditional pulled tea with less sugar. Creamy and frothy.

reviews.comment: RM3.00 for authentic teh tarik! Better than mamak chains at half the price.

name: Ayam Gepuk Sambal Korek
description: Smashed fried chicken with explosive sambal korek. Indonesian-Malaysian fusion.

reviews.comment: The sambal is legendary! RM10.50 for this flavour bomb is amazing value.

name: Mee Goreng Mamak
description: Stir-fried yellow noodles with egg, vegetables, tofu and spicy sambal.

reviews.comment: Classic mamak mee goreng at RM7.50! Generous portion and proper wok flavour.

name: Kopi O Kaw
description: Strong traditional Malaysian black coffee. Brewed with premium beans using sock filter.

reviews.comment: RM2.80 for kopi kaw! Strong and aromatic. Uncle Lim has been brewing for 30 years.

name: Teh Ais Limau
description: Refreshing iced tea with lime. Perfect for hot Malaysian weather.

reviews.comment: So refreshing! RM3.50 for big glass of teh ais limau beats bubble tea prices.

name: Matcha Latte
description: Premium Japanese matcha with fresh milk. Earthy and creamy.

reviews.comment: Good matcha quality for RM10.90. Not too sweet, proper matcha taste.

name: Signature Hot Chocolate
description: Rich chocolate with steamed milk, topped with whipped cream.

reviews.comment: Very chocolatey but RM15.50 is expensive. Good as occasional treat.

name: Coca-Cola Large
description: Refreshing Coca-Cola served ice cold.

reviews.comment: RM5.50 for soft drink is overpriced. Better to get from grocery store.

name: Mango Smoothie
description: Fresh mango blended with ice. No added sugar.

reviews.comment: Real mango taste! RM8.00 for fresh smoothie is great value. No artificial sugar.

name: Satay Ayam 10 Cucuk
description: Grilled chicken satay with peanut sauce, cucumber and ketupat. 10 sticks.

reviews.comment: RM12 for 10 sticks with ketupat! Authentic charcoal-grilled satay.

name: Laksa Penang
description: Tangy and spicy rice noodles in tamarind-based fish broth with prawns and fish cake.

reviews.comment: Authentic Penang laksa! Sour, spicy and full of flavour. RM10 only!

name: Roti Tisu
description: Crispy thin stretched bread with sugar. Sweet mamak delight.

reviews.comment: Crispy and sweet! Perfect for supper. RM5.00 is reasonable for this treat.

name: Sparkling Passion Fruit Tea
description: Refreshing passion fruit tea with sparkling water and aloe vera.

reviews.comment: Refreshing on hot days! RM9.50 is fair for specialty fruit tea.

name: Roasted Milk Tea with Pearl
description: Premium roasted milk tea with chewy tapioca pearls. Classic Chatime favorite.

reviews.comment: Classic roasted flavor! RM9.90 is reasonable for the quality.

name: Teh Ais Kaw
description: Strong pulled tea with ice. Refreshing and perfect for hot days.

reviews.comment: RM3.20 for strong teh ais! Uncle Lim makes it perfect every time.

name: Roti Canai Kosong
description: Flaky, crispy plain roti served with dhal curry and sambal.

reviews.comment: RM1.80 for roti canai! Best value breakfast. Crispy and delicious.

name: Char Kuey Teow Halal
description: Wok-fried flat noodles with chicken, fish cake, and egg. Halal-friendly version.

reviews.comment: Good halal CKT! RM10.50 for big portion. Nice wok hei.

name: Mee Goreng Special
description: Yellow noodles stir-fried with egg, tofu, and vegetables in spicy sauce.

reviews.comment: RM7.00 for mee goreng! Good portion and spicy enough.

name: Curry Laksa
description: Spicy coconut curry noodles with tofu puffs, fish balls, and bean sprouts.

reviews.comment: RM9.50 for curry laksa! Rich coconut broth and generous toppings.

name: Satay Kajang Style 8 Sticks
description: Grilled chicken satay with rich peanut sauce, cucumber, and ketupat.

reviews.comment: RM10 for 8 sticks! Authentic Kajang style satay.

name: Nasi Lemak Ayam Berempah
description: Fragrant coconut rice with spiced fried chicken, sambal, peanuts, and egg.

reviews.comment: RM9 for nasi lemak with ayam berempah! Sambal is amazing.

name: Teh Tarik Original
description: Classic pulled tea with condensed milk. Sweet and creamy.

reviews.comment: RM2.50 for teh tarik! Perfect sweetness and froth.

name: Milk Tea Tarik
description: Local style milk tea with condensed milk and evaporated milk.

reviews.comment: RM3.80 for mamak milk tea! Creamy and comforting.

name: Teh Ais
description: Malaysian iced milk tea with a modern twist. Smooth and refreshing.

reviews.comment: RM7.50 for modern teh ais! Good balance of tea and milk.

name: Char Kuey Teow Basah
description: Wet-style CKT with more gravy, perfect for those who love saucy noodles.

reviews.comment: RM10 for wet CKT! Love the extra gravy. Authentic Penang style.

name: Laksa Sarawak
description: Creamy Sarawak laksa with coconut and sambal belacan broth.

reviews.comment: RM11 for Sarawak laksa! Authentic taste from Kuching.

name: Satay Daging 6 Sticks
description: Grilled beef satay with peanut sauce and ketupat.

reviews.comment: RM9 for beef satay! Tender meat and great peanut sauce.

name: Roti Planta
description: Sweet roti with margarine and sugar. Popular among kids.

reviews.comment: RM2.50 for sweet roti! Kids love this for breakfast.

name: Mee Goreng Ayam
description: Stir-fried noodles with chicken, egg, and vegetables. Homemade sambal.

reviews.comment: RM8.50 with chicken! Generous portion and spicy sambal.

name: Beef Noodle Special
description: A comforting bowl of traditional Vietnamese beef noodle soup with premium beef slices.

reviews.comment: The broth was incredibly rich and authentic, easily the best beef noodles I've had in a while.

name: Clam in Coconut Broth with Vermicelli
description: Fresh clams simmered in a rich and aromatic coconut broth served with vermicelli noodles.

reviews.comment: Very flavorful coconut broth, and the clams were fresh. A bit heavy but satisfying.

name: Grilled Lemongrass Chicken
description: Succulent chicken thigh marinated in fragrant lemongrass, grilled to a perfect char.

reviews.comment: Chicken was perfectly grilled with a great lemongrass aroma. Portion size was decent.

name: Grilled Pork Chop
description: Tender and juicy pork chop marinated in savory Vietnamese spices and grilled over an open flame.

reviews.comment: Absolutely delicious! The pork chop was tender, juicy, and packed with savory flavors.

name: Coconut Coffee
description: A refreshing and creamy blend of strong Vietnamese coffee and sweet coconut milk.

reviews.comment: A beautiful balance of strong coffee and sweet, creamy coconut. Highly recommend for coffee lovers.

name: Iced Lemongrass Ginger Drink
description: A cooling, aromatic iced beverage steeped with fresh lemongrass stalks and sliced ginger.

reviews.comment: Very refreshing on a hot day. The ginger gives it a nice subtle kick.

name: Iced Lime & Mint Tea
description: A zesty and revitalizing iced tea flavored with freshly squeezed lime juice and muddled mint leaves.

reviews.comment: Zesty and cooling. Just the right amount of sweetness to balance the lime.

name: Half Boiled Egg
description: Classic breakfast staple featuring perfectly half-boiled eggs with a runny yolk.

reviews.comment: Simple but cooked to perfection. Yolk was perfectly runny.

name: French Toast
description: Golden deep-fried Hong Kong-style French toast, served with a slab of butter and golden syrup.

reviews.comment: Crispy on the outside, fluffy inside with a nice peanut butter filling!

name: Soy Sauce Chicken Rice
description: Tender poached chicken soaked in a rich, savory soy sauce blend, served over steamed rice.

reviews.comment: The chicken is incredibly smooth and the soy sauce is perfectly balanced.

name: Scrambled Egg & Shrimp Fried Rice
description: Silky, creamy scrambled eggs poured over fragrant shrimp fried rice.

reviews.comment: The scrambled egg is so silky! A very comforting and hearty dish.

name: Sweet and Sour Fish Rice
description: Crispy fried fish fillets tossed in a tangy sweet and sour sauce, served with white rice.

reviews.comment: Nice crispy fish and the sauce hits the right sweet and sour notes.

name: Spam Sausage Nissin Instant Noodles
description: A true Cha Chaan Teng classic: springy Nissin noodles topped with pan-fried spam and sausage.

reviews.comment: Ultimate comfort food! Takes me right back to Hong Kong.

name: Coke Lemon Plum
description: An iced Coca-Cola mixed with fresh lemon slices and salted plum for a unique sweet, sour, and salty kick.

reviews.comment: Very refreshing, the salted plum gives it an interesting and delicious twist.

name: Honey Lemon
description: A soothing blend of natural honey and fresh lemon juice served cold.

reviews.comment: Not too sweet, exactly what I needed to quench my thirst.

name: HK Ice Lemon Tea
description: Authentic Hong Kong style iced lemon tea, featuring strong black tea and freshly sliced lemons.

reviews.comment: Proper HK style tea, very strong and they give plenty of lemon slices to poke.

name: Mixed Mushroom Soup
description: A creamy, hearty soup made with a blend of fresh wild mushrooms and herbs.

reviews.comment: Very comforting and creamy. The mushroom flavor is deep and earthy.

name: Chicken & Mushroom Pie
description: A classic pie with a flaky pastry crust filled with tender chicken chunks and mushrooms in a creamy sauce.

reviews.comment: The pastry is perfectly flaky and the filling is so savory and rich.

name: Dave's Original 1/4 Roast Chicken
description: Signature roasted quarter chicken served with Dave's famous magic gravy and sides.

reviews.comment: Their signature roast chicken never disappoints. That magic gravy really is magic!

name: Fish & Chips
description: Golden, crispy battered fish fillet served with a generous portion of fries and tartar sauce.

reviews.comment: Huge portion of fish! Batter was crispy, although a bit oily.

name: Tomato Beef Bolognese
description: Al dente spaghetti tossed in a rich, slow-cooked minced beef and tomato ragu.

reviews.comment: A very solid bolognese. The sauce tasted authentic and meaty.

name: Aglio Olio Roast Chicken
description: Classic spaghetti aglio olio with garlic and chili flakes, topped with tender slices of roast chicken.

reviews.comment: Nice garlicky kick and the chicken was a great addition to a simple pasta.

name: Fries
description: A generous portion of crispy, golden potato fries seasoned with salt.

reviews.comment: Standard fries, nice and hot.

name: Garlic Focaccia Bread
description: Soft, oven-baked focaccia bread spread with savory garlic butter.

reviews.comment: So fluffy and the garlic butter is incredible. Perfect side dish.
